title: RevolutionEHR - Eye Care Practice Platform
problem: Optometry and ophthalmology practices need integrated EHR and practice management designed for eye care workflows.
solution: Cloud-based EHR and practice management platform specifically designed for optometry and ophthalmology practices.
technology: Cloud EHR, practice management, optical dispensing integration, patient portal
traction_signals: Major player in eye care EHR
varden_fit: Moderate - Specialty practice management for eye care. Could be integration partner or model.
notes: Established ophthalmology/optometry EHR. Strong in optical dispensing integration.
